zh.title: 儒勒·凡尔纳科技预言全集 - 科幻之父对未来科技的16条预言与验证 | Jules Verne Predictions
zh.description: 法国科幻小说之父儒勒·凡尔纳（1828-1905）在其「非凡旅程」系列小说中预言了潜水艇、登月飞行、直升机、视频通话、电动潜艇、太空站等众多科技，数十年后逐一成为现实。
zh.keywords: 儒勒凡尔纳,凡尔纳预言,科幻之父,Jules Verne,海底两万里,从地球到月球,科技预言,科幻小说预言,凡尔纳预测
zh.ogTitle: 儒勒·凡尔纳科技预言全集 | Jules Verne Predictions
zh.ogDescription: 科幻之父儒勒·凡尔纳在小说中预言了潜水艇、登月、直升机、视频通话等众多科技，数十年后逐一成为现实。
zh.twitterDescription: 科幻之父凡尔纳的16条科技预言与验证：潜水艇、登月、直升机、视频通话、电动潜艇等，几乎全部成为现实。

en.title: Jules Verne Predictions - 16 Technological Prophecies from the Father of Science Fiction | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: French novelist Jules Verne (1828-1905) predicted submarines, Moon landings, helicopters, videoconferencing, electric submarines, space stations, and more in his Extraordinary Voyages novels, decades before their invention.
en.keywords: Jules Verne,Verne predictions,father of science fiction,20000 Leagues,From the Earth to the Moon,technology predictions,sci-fi prophecies,Verne inventions
en.ogTitle: Jules Verne Predictions - The Father of Science Fiction's Technological Prophecies
en.ogDescription: 16 technological predictions from Jules Verne's novels. Submarines, Moon landings, helicopters, videoconferencing — almost all came true.
en.twitterDescription: 16 predictions from Jules Verne, father of science fiction. Submarines, Moon landings, helicopters, videoconferencing — almost all came true.
